violations.text: The doors to the outside, leading to the dumpster area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser fan guards and condenser in the walk-in cooler, as well as the ice machine, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Raw animal foods such roasts were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as ribs in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food was separated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Seafood salad and potato salad was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were added to food items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

ROP mahi-mahi was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. Mah-mahi was observed still frozen and was taken out of the packaging at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The door to the outside, located by the dumpster and the double doors in the main dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Tomatoes were not washed before being cut. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Tomatoes were washed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish wash area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
